items.name: Chatpate
items.description: Puffed rice, mixed with onion, tomato, potatoes, Nepali snacks, lemon juice, nuts with homemade spices & garnished with coriander leaf, SERVED COLD

items.name: Aalu Wo
items.description: Sliced boiled potato dipped in special batter and deep fried, SERVED HOT

items.name: Aalu Nimki
items.description: Aloo Nimki is an incredibly popular street food from the eastern Nepali city of Dharan. It's a crunchy, saucy and flavourful symphony in your mouth.

items.name: Aalu Chop
items.description: Fried spiced potato croquette/patty. Crispy on the outside and moist on the inside.

items.name: Bara
items.description: Bara (Lentil Flitters) can be enjoyed as a appetizer, or even as a snack. These vegan crunchy lentil flitters/Bara are sure to satisfy

items.name: Aalu Sadheko
items.description: Boiled potatoes marinated Nepali spices

items.name: Badam Sadheko
items.description: Badam Sadheko is a spiced and zesty Nepali Peanut Salad that is a delicious and nutritious snack that can be enjoyed any time of the day. , SERVED COLD

items.name: Hariyo Bhatmas Sadheko
items.description: Hariyo Bhatmas Sadheko is a spiced and zesty Nepali green soybean Salad, SERVED COLD

items.name: Samosa
items.description: 2 pieces

items.name: Aalu Tama
items.description: Aloo Tama is a Nepali stew made with bamboo-shoot, potatoes, and black-eyed peas

items.name: Chips Chilli
items.description: Chips Chilli (Vegan) Marinated chips with Nepalese spices and deep fried with onions, green chillies, tomatoes & capsicums toppings (served hot)

items.name: Paneer Chilli
items.description: Cottage Cheese with Nepalese spices and deep fried with onions, green chillies, tomatoes & capsicums toppings (served hot)

items.name: Bhuttan with Baji
items.description: Bhuttan in Nepali, is a spicy dish prepared with goat tripe and other digestive parts that has been stir-fried in a wok or a frying pan with Nepali herbs and condiments. It also includes Liver and kidneys. It is served with Baji (Beaten Rice / Flattened rice)

items.name: Buffalo Chilli / Chicken Chilli
items.description: tender pieces of meat with ginger, garlic and different Nepalese spices. The meat is deep fried and pan fried with dice onion, capsicum and pepper with hints of sweet chilli sauce and soy sauce.

items.name: Fokso Fry
items.description: Swoo is a traditional starter in Newari Cuisine known as Fokso in a nepali term meaning mutton lungs. Mutton lungs is filled with batter then boiled and deep fried

items.name: Jibro Fry
items.description: It is a goat tounge which is boiled first and then fried with different flavourful masala. It is soft crunchy in texture and taste is just amazing.

items.name: Giddi Fry
items.description: Gidi Fry is a popular dish that actually includes Goat brains cooked with special Nepali herbs and spices

items.name: Sukuti Sadheko (Buffalo Jerkey)
items.description: Sukuti Sadheko is a truly unique Nepali dish that offers such a wonderful range of flavours and textures. Imagine crispy pieces of dried meat, mixed with spices that tingle your taste buds, offering a dance of flavors in every bite. For those new to this delicacy, Sukuti is smoke-dried meat.

items.name: Choyela
items.description: Chargrilled chicken or Buff marinated in homemade roasted masala, SERVED COLD

items.name: Choyela with Baji
items.description: choyela served with Beaten Rice pickle and salad. SERVED COLD

items.name: Chicken Lollipop
items.description: Marinated with homemade spices and deep fried, served with homemade dipping Sauce

items.name: Hot Wings
items.description: deep fried wings marinated with secret hot spices

items.name: Wo
items.description: Nepalese style lentil pancakes mixed with different herbs & homemade spices served with homemade sauces

items.name: Chatamari
items.description: It consists of a rice crepe which is topped with minced meat, vegetables and an egg in the middle : packed with flavor and amazing textures.

items.name: Steam Momo
items.description: Steamed Nepali dumplings served with spicy homemade sauce

items.name: Kothey Momo
items.description: half pan fried and half steamed momo

items.name: Chilli Momo
items.description: Fried Nepali dumplings served in sweet and spicy sauce

items.name: Fried Momo
items.description: Deep fried Nepali dumplings served with special hot sauce and Momo sauce

items.name: Jhol Momo
items.description: Steam Momo served with a broth that is a mixture of a spicy sauce known as achar. served with HOT Jhol tomato based or COLD Jhol sesame seed based

items.name: Momo Platter
items.description: five pieces of steam, chilli, kothey and momo served with homemade sauce

items.name: Chow Mein
items.description: stir-fried noodles in Nepali way served hot

items.name: Keema Noodles
items.description: Boiled noodles served with soy chilli sauce topped with chicken or buff minced cooked using homemade spices

items.name: Thukpa
items.description: which originated in the eastern part of Tibet. Nepalese version of Thukpa has a predominant vegetarian feature and a bit of spicier flavor. Thukpa can be prepared in both vegetarian and non-vegetarian variations; the most popular non-vegetarian variation includes chicken

items.name: Sekuwa Set
items.description: Sekuwa is meat grilled or pan fried. While the meat is still raw, it is mixed with natural herbs and spices and other ingredients.

items.name: Nepali Style Fried Rice
items.description: Fried rice in typical Nepali style

items.name: Samay Baji
items.description: Samay Baji consists of many items on a single plate. Among them are boiled rice, wo, Choyela, fried boiled egg, black soybeans, spicy potato salad (Aalu-sadheko), finely cut ginger, green leaves (Saag).

items.name: Nepali Dal Bhat Power
items.description: Nepali steam rice served with lentils seasonal leaves, seasonal vegetables, gundruk, pickle, tomato pickle and yogurt. PRE ORDER ONLY. Time required minimum 45 minutes and 2 people. ADD ON CHARGES APPLIES FOR EXTRA. Dine In only Not For Takeaway

items.name: Yomari
items.description: Yomari is a delicacy of the Newar community in Nepal. It is a steamed dumpling that consists of an external covering of rice flour with sweet fillings such as Chakku and Khuwa. Chakku, often referred to as Nepali molasses, is a sweet delicacy deeply rooted in Nepali culture. It is a thick, dark syrup made from concentrated sugarcane juice or other sources of sugar. Khuwa is made of either dried whole milk or milk thickened by heating in an open iron pan.

items.name: Juju Dhau (King Curd/Yoghurt) Panna Cotta
items.description: A Taste of Bhaktapur, Nepal. Immerse yourself in the rich heritage of Bhaktapur with our Juju Dhau Panna Cotta, a modern take on the iconic King Curd. Complemented by the sweet charm of Lal Mohan (Gulab Jamun), this dessert is a flavorful journey through Nepal's traditions.

items.name: Vanilla Ice Cream 2 Scoops
items.description: Can be served with Chocolate or Strawberry toppings

items.name: Vegan Lover
items.description: ADD CHHYANG 1 CHYARNI FOR $14 EXTRA. MOMO, AALU CHOP, WO, AALU SADEKO, Mix Achar

items.name: Chicken Lover
items.description: ADD CHHYANG 1 CHYARNI FOR $14 EXTRA. Hot Wings, lollipop, Choila, Mix aachar

items.name: Bhoye Set
items.description: ADD CHHYANG 1 CHYARNI FOR $14 EXTRA. Baji, Aalu Tama, mix aachar, Badam Sadeheko, Aalu Sadeheko, Choila, Bhuttan, Sekuwa

items.name: Chhyang by Bowl
items.description: Nepali & Tibetan alcoholic beverage popular in Nepal made from rice

items.description: Nepali & Tibetan alcoholic beverage popular in Nepal made from rice
